title: Plett’s own Ntlabakanye to debut for Springboks
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Asenathi Ntlabakanye (26), originally from Plettenberg Bay (Crags), will make his long-awaited debut for the Springboks this weekend.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Asenathi Ntlabakanye (26), originally from Plettenberg Bay (Crags), will make his long-awaited debut for the Springboks this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Head coach Rassie Erasmus has named Ntlabakanye in the starting lineup at tighthead prop (jersey number 3) for the highly anticipated clash against the Barbarians."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match will take place at DHL Stadium in Cape Town on Saturday 28 June, kicking off at 17:00.","html":"The match will take place at DHL Stadium in Cape Town on Saturday 28 June, kicking off at 17:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in the week's edition of the Knysna Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in the week's edition of the Knysna Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Plett’s own Ntlabakanye to debut for Springboks
